cards.name: The Spark
cards.upright: the diff kindles a new idea; the reviewers lean in.
cards.reversed: a false start; the ember dies before the branch draws breath.

cards.name: The Forge
cards.upright: the change is hammered into shape; conventions are honored.
cards.reversed: brittle temper; the code cracks under its first test.

cards.name: The Mirror
cards.upright: eyes fall upon the code and see it as it is; a fair reading.
cards.reversed: self-deception; the author has not read their own diff.

cards.name: The Bridge
cards.upright: two branches meet without shudder; CI hums beneath the arch.
cards.reversed: the span collapses at the seam; conflicts hide in the abutments.

cards.name: The Sunrise
cards.upright: the change ships at first light; production greets it gently.
cards.reversed: false dawn; the deploy pipe stalls and dusk returns.
